The Upside of Anger (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $18,761,993Details
International Box Office $10,153,768
Worldwide Box Office $28,915,761
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$211,559 (1.1% of total gross)
Legs:4.66 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:64.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$12,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:9 opening theaters/1,166 max. theaters, 5.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $35,006,776

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 11th, 2005 (Limited) by New Line
International Releases: May 13th, 2005 (Wide), released as The Upside Of Anger (Australia)
Video Release: July 26th, 2005 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: R for language, sexual situations, brief comic violence and some drug use.
Running Time: 117 minutes
Plot point: Accidental Death, Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Dysfunctional Family, Former Professional Athlete, Romance, Surprise Twist, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Social setting: Radio Industry
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
